changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz per AP — blockade is selective (US/Israeli ships banned only), not total closure. Iran easing on non-aligned nations. Putin-Trump call today yielded no Ukraine breakthrough. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active Mar 18-23. ME military escalation continues with IRGC announcing Gulf energy infrastructure attacks.

latest_news.headline: IRGC announces formal attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure — retaliation for South Pars
latest_news.text: IRGC says it has begun attacking other countries' energy infrastructure in response to US/Israel strikes on Iran's energy infrastructure. Warning: 'subsequent attacks will not cease until complete destruction'.

latest_news.headline: ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz despite war — Iran selectively enforcing blockade
latest_news.text: AP: ~90 ships have crossed Hormuz. Iran exporting millions of barrels despite war. Blockade bans US/Israeli ships but allows others. Not total closure.

latest_news.headline: Kremlin says Ukraine peace process 'fizzling out' as Trump focuses on Iran
latest_news.text: Kremlin dismissed Ukraine peace process, saying Trump's attention is now on Iran and he is losing interest in Ukraine. Putin-Trump call today yielded no concrete breakthrough.

latest_news.headline: Russia financially benefiting from Iran war — US sanctions waiver confirmed
latest_news.text: US Treasury issued 30-day waiver allowing Russia to sell oil already loaded on tankers. Analysts say Moscow benefiting as energy prices spike from Hormuz closure.

latest_news.headline: Fed holds rates steady citing war-driven economic uncertainty
latest_news.text: Federal Reserve pauses rate hikes for second consecutive time in 2026. War causing energy price spikes threatening inflation. Brent ~$105-110.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 22:04 UTC) — (1) IRGC formally announces attacks on ALL Gulf energy infrastructure — major escalation; (2) ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz — blockade selective, not total; (3) Putin-Trump call today — Kremlin says peace process 'fizzling out' as Trump focused on Iran; (4) Russia financially benefiting from oil shock — US sanctions waiver; (5) Fed pauses rates, cites war uncertainty; (6) Oil ~$105-110, trending toward $120; (7) Eid ceasefire active in Pakistan-Afghanistan (Mar 18-23); (8) No ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.
